scripts.dev: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev:backend & bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.dev:backend: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev --workspace backend
scripts.test: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run test --workspace backend && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.build: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run build --workspace backend && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run lint --workspace backend && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.dev:all-local: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev:db & bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev:backend & bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm run dev:frontend
